name: Haptal Robotics Failure Benchmark v1.1
description: Synthetic failure detection benchmark for evaluating robot training data quality. Built on real LeRobot manipulation trajectories with randomised physics-based failure injection and hard negative examples.
changes_vs_v1: Randomised injection magnitudes, timing, duration per episode
30% of nominal class are hard negatives
Per-episode RandomState — no fixed seeds inside injectors
